'''鈭歝h-ng-d''' ('''kachangad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbeach|unbeach]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbeach|unbeach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-ng-d
|-
! Lemma
| kachangad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichangad|thichangad]] || [[word:jichangad|jichangad]] || [[word:shichangad|shichangad]] || [[word:kichangad|kichangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchangad|thuthuchangad]] || [[word:jujuchangad|jujuchangad]] || [[word:shushuchangad|shushuchangad]] || [[word:kukuchangad|kukuchangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchangad|thuchangad]] || [[word:juchangad|juchangad]] || [[word:shuchangad|shuchangad]] || [[word:kuchangad|kuchangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchangad|thuchangad]] || [[word:juchangad|juchangad]] || [[word:shuchangad|shuchangad]] || [[word:kuchangad|kuchangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechangad|thechangad]] || [[word:jechangad|jechangad]] || [[word:shechangad|shechangad]] || [[word:kechangad|kechangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochangad|thothochangad]] || [[word:jojochangad|jojochangad]] || [[word:shoshochangad|shoshochangad]] || [[word:kokochangad|kokochangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochangad|thochangad]] || [[word:jochangad|jochangad]] || [[word:shochangad|shochangad]] || [[word:kochangad|kochangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochangad|thochangad]] || [[word:jochangad|jochangad]] || [[word:shochangad|shochangad]] || [[word:kochangad|kochangad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]] || [[word:changad|changad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙changad|th忙changad]] || [[word:j忙changad|j忙changad]] || [[word:sh忙changad|sh忙changad]] || [[word:k忙changad|k忙changad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachangad|thathachangad]] || [[word:jajachangad|jajachangad]] || [[word:shashachangad|shashachangad]] || [[word:kakachangad|kakachangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachangad|thachangad]] || [[word:jachangad|jachangad]] || [[word:shachangad|shachangad]] || [[word:kachangad|kachangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachangad|thachangad]] || [[word:jachangad|jachangad]] || [[word:shachangad|shachangad]] || [[word:kachangad|kachangad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachangad|shachangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachangad|goshachangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachangad|gokishachangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachangadn眉|shachangadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachangadnkn眉|goshachangadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachangadn眉|gokishachangadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachangadsh毛|shachangadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachangadnksh毛|goshachangadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachangadsh毛|gokishachangadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachangadro|shachangadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachangadnkro|goshachangadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachangadro|gokishachangadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachangadmu|shachangadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachangadnkmu|goshachangadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachangadmu|gokishachangadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachangadsher|shachangadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachangadnksher|goshachangadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachangadsher|gokishachangadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachangadng|shachangadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachangadnkng|goshachangadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachangadng|gokishachangadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachangadya|shachangadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachangadnkya|goshachangadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachangadya|gokishachangadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachangadyam|shachangadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachangadnkyam|goshachangadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachangadyam|gokishachangadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachangadn眉sh毛|shachangadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachangadnkn眉sh毛|goshachangadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachangadn眉sh毛|gokishachangadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachangadn眉ro|shachangadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachangadnkn眉ro|goshachangadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachangadn眉ro|gokishachangadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachangadn眉mu|shachangadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachangadnkn眉mu|goshachangadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachangadn眉mu|gokishachangadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachangadsh毛n眉|shachangadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachangadnksh毛n眉|goshachangadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachangadsh毛n眉|gokishachangadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachangadsh毛ro|shachangadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachangadnksh毛ro|goshachangadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachangadsh毛ro|gokishachangadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachangadsh毛mu|shachangadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachangadnksh毛mu|goshachangadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachangadsh毛mu|gokishachangadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachangadron眉|shachangadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachangadnkron眉|goshachangadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachangadron眉|gokishachangadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachangadrosh毛|shachangadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachangadnkrosh毛|goshachangadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachangadrosh毛|gokishachangadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachangadromu|shachangadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachangadnkromu|goshachangadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachangadromu|gokishachangadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachangadmun眉|shachangadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachangadnkmun眉|goshachangadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachangadmun眉|gokishachangadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachangadmush毛|shachangadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachangadnkmush毛|goshachangadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachangadmush毛|gokishachangadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachangadmuro|shachangadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachangadnkmuro|goshachangadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachangadmuro|gokishachangadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
